experiments.name: Baseline GNN + Full Training
experiments.purpose: Train PocketGNN V1 and PocketGNNXL V3; evaluate on held-out CryptoSite and PCNA structures
experiments.hypothesis: GATv2Conv + ESM2 will outperform baseline GATv2Conv on held-out cryptic pocket detection
experiments.expected_outcome: V3 AUROC > 0.80 on held-out; AOH1996 gate PASS
experiments.actual_outcome: V3 held-out AUROC 0.8081; AOH gate 0.8676 PASS

experiments.name: ANM Structural Dynamics
experiments.purpose: Compare ANM flexibility of predicted pocket in apo (1W60) vs holo (8GLA) PCNA
experiments.hypothesis: Holo pocket will show elevated fold-change and DCCM vs apo

experiments.name: MD Validation — 100 ns OpenMM
experiments.purpose: Confirm cryptic pocket opens dynamically in apo 1W60 via RMSF + pocket volume tracking
experiments.hypothesis: Predicted pocket residues will show RMSF > 1.5 Å and transient volume > 100 Å³
experiments.notes: Running on Google Cloud L4. DCD: data/md/1W60_production.dcd. ~140 ns/day, 100 ns likely done.
